_comment: Hook block for the Agentic Development Pipeline. `install.sh` merges these three hooks into your target settings.json automatically — this template is reference for manual setup or review. The command base shown here is the PROJECT-LEVEL form ("${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/..."). For a USER-LEVEL install (~/.claude), replace every "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/" with "$HOME/.claude/hooks/" — user-level settings apply across all projects, where ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} would resolve wrong. The three hooks self-locate their support files via $0, so only the script path in the command needs to match your install level.
